title: Pipeline Efficiency Execution Root
description: Shared execution root for migrating the test pipeline to pytest with controlled parallel rollout, trimming redundant developer skill content, and removing Python-specific tester-template commands.
acceptance_criteria: Pytest and pytest-xdist are adopted through a two-phase rollout: serial compatibility first, parallel execution second.
The configured full-suite command ends at `uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q`.
The three targeted developer-facing skill files are reduced by at least 25% in combined character count without shifting that removed content into CLAUDE.md.
`templates/agents/tester.md` contains no runner-specific command syntax and defers command mechanics to `capability/test-execution`.
Testing, documentation, and review happen after the combined implementation set is ready, with an explicit review gate for the skill trimming work.
